_comment: PSMutant tested against ITSELF (dogfooding). Mutates its own pure layers — the AST operators and the scoring/report code — and checks the operator/report suites kill those mutants. Sandbox New/Remove/Clear are deliberately NOT self-mutated (real temp side-effects, shared sandbox); they're covered by tests/Sandbox.Tests.ps1 in the normal suite. Run: Invoke-PSMutation -ConfigFile ./psmutant.self.config.json -SourceRoot .
